provenance.method: specific-yield constant 1300 kWh/kWp/yr (Atlanta, GA; NREL PVWatts v8 / NSRDB TMY regional, ~14% losses)
provenance.note: Grid factor 0.3837 kg CO2/kWh (EPA eGRID2023 Rev 2, SRSO). Capacity from --capacity-kw override.

NREL_API_KEY is set but NREL_API_BASE is not — live HTTP skipped. For safety the key is NOT sent to any default domain; set NREL_API_BASE to an endpoint you have verified as official NREL to enable it.
